2026-04-15.daytime: Go south et ensuite east to enter Practice Building; Go down the stairs and you will see the mission marker on the map. Aller à the mission mark to start a cutscene; Après le scene, Aller à the second floor and follow Ryuji dans le PE Bureau des professeurs; Third Château Infiltration; If you want to follow the Recommended Fusion Path and the Personas to capture in Shadow Information , it starts now. These tables are a “recommended” fusion path for people that want a super-easy experience without going deep dans le fusion system. You can capture and fuse any Persona you want even if following the Recommended Fusion Path If you aren’t high enough Niveau to capture a Persona you don’t need to grind, there is always a way to fuse or capture it later If you don't want to follow the Fusion Path, capture every Persona you encounter because they are necessary for Confident Bonuses and La Force Ranks. If you don't follow the Fusion path and aren't capturing Personas, you won't be able to keep up with the schedule, so do one or the other You have to grind some Argent before proceeding with the story. In a few days, we will spend all of it. The goal is 15.000 yen. Sometimes knocking down enemies and demanding Argent gives more than killing them does. It depends on the amount and type of enemy you are fighting. In a battle with a lot of enemies (3 or more), it will give more Argent to kill them all The Niveau of the enemy will also affect how much Argent they will give when you hold them at gunpoint. Higher-Niveau enemies give more Argent In a few days, we will need 2 Tin Claps and 2 Silk Yarn. If you drop them from enemies, great. If not, we will have to Acheter it. Tin Claps Coût 2.050 each and Silk Yarn costs 1.150 each. Add the ones you need to your farming total, so if you need to Acheter 2 Tin Claps, you will need 19.100 total. DO NOT go past the room with three Shadows and one Trésor Chest, otherwise, you will be locked dans a story event and you won’t be able to grind anymore. Kill the three Shadows, go back to the entrance, save the Jeu, and repeat; When you have the necessary Argent, continue forward to start the story events. Remember that you can check Special Enemies for information about Boss fights; L'Amoureux Rang 1; Parler avec the Punk-rock Woman in Leblanc; Le Bateleur Rang 1.

2026-04-24.daytime: You will be forced dans a meeting with your team, just exit; Aller à Shibuya Passage souterrain and Acheter the fruit drink from the stand. Charme +1; You can only Acheter the fruit drink on Sundays and it changes every time you Acheter it, giving different stats. The schedule will always point out when it's the day to get another drink. Make sure to never skip it, otherwise, the stat will never realign with the schedule Open the map with and select Aoyama-Itchome, then choose "Hideout" to meet up and infiltrate the Palais; Fourth Château Infiltration, for real this time; During the Persona fusion Tutoriel, fuse Arsene and Pixie to get Agathion (Le Chariot, 3). Pass on Eiha and Zio; The number of skills you are able to pass down to a new Persona when fusing depends on the Niveau of the Personas used. A Niveau 1 Arsene fused with a Niveau 2 Pixie will only net one inherit Aptitude slot. So if you are not able to pass both Eiha and Zio in this case its because you are slightly underlevel. Farming for levels is not required unless the guide says that you need a specific Aptitude obtained at a specific Niveau If there is only one slot available its recommended to inherit Eiha since Agathion will learn Zio at Niveau 7, and Pixie also has Zio from the start. The key to combat is having access to as many elements as possible Le Mat Rang 2; This is a very difficult Palais because it’s so early in the Jeu that we don’t have access to Personas, skills, or items to help us out, but we still need to finish it in one day otherwise we won’t be able to get everything in one playthrough. Keep multiple saves just to be safe and use the SP items bought from the Distributeurs; This Palais features a puzzle where you need to find books in small rooms adjacent to a big Bibliothèque et ensuite fit the books on the right shelves. The northern shelf that has books about the feats of Kamoshida is where you put the King Book. The eastern shelf that talks about girls in the volleyball team is the place for the Queen Book. And finally, the eastern shelf is where the Slave Book goes. After all the books are in place, a new path will open up; Will Seeds are a new mechanic in Royal, there are 3 seeds to collect in every Palais. When all 3 are collected, they will turn dans an accessory that gives a powerful Aptitude to the person that uses it. They also recover a bit of SP every time one is collected, which is an huge deal in the early Jeu; Red Seed: it’s part of the Tutoriel, your teammates will tell you to go get it; Once you reach the roof, the enemies will become quite strong. It's recommended to skip all the battles until you are à l'intérieur the Château again. When the Trésor is found, you can farm as much as you like, but pour l'instant, focus on reaching the end of the Palais; Green Seed: When you are using the grappling hook to climb the outside of the La Tour, the Seed will be at the very top. Enter the first window and crawl à l'intérieur a vent to reach a higher area where you can use the grappling hook to get higher; Blue Seed: Back à l'intérieur the Château, when the rooms start to shift, take the elevator down. You will see another elevator in the new area that can't be used. Continue through Kamoshida’s painting to unlock a shortcut to the very beginning of the Palais. Explore this area to find a lever that activates the other elevator. Go back through the painting and use the new elevator that we just activated to go down to a new area and fight the first Will Seed Guardian; Reach the Trésor and farm until you are Niveau 9 with 20.000 yen; Fuse Silky and Agathion to get Berith (Le Pape, 9); If you don't know who Silky is, the Shadow name can be found in the Shadows Information; Quitter le Palais after securing the route to the Trésor, fusing Berith, and getting the necessary Argent; When you are ready to leave, make sure you have a L'Amoureux Personas; Almost every Sunday, you can check the TV and Acheter unique or rare items from the Shopping Program. Some of them are useful, others aren’t. This schedule was designed to have the Argent to Acheter from the Shopping Program every time; There are always two options to choose from, and you can only pick one Today, the bundles are Spring Awake Set: 10 items that cure sleep and 10 that cure dizzy, as well as a Sleep Immunity accessory OR Share of Spring Set, 5 items that heal 10 SP each, 1 Objet that heals 40 HP to all allies, and 1 Objet that heals 80 HP to all allies. It's recommended to Acheter the Share of Spring Set . SP is too valuable in the early Jeu Talk with Sojiro; Got it (+3); Le Pape Rang 1.

This is not mandatory, but in lower difficulties it will end the battle a lot faster. 2026-05-25.daytime: Steal Madarame’s Heart; Before starting the fight make sure Joker has all basic elemental attacks (fire, ice, elec, and wind) and they can’t be the ones that hit all targets, they need to be single target; Boss Ichiryusai Azazel Madarame: Madarame is one of the hardest bosses in the Jeu if not the hardest, and that's for one simple reason, he can hit all your party members' weaknesses in one turn, essentially killing everyone from full HP. The Eyes drain elemental attacks and can cast all basic elemental spells, the Mouth drains physical attacks and attacks normally, and the Nose has Tarukaja and Rakunda. The best way to deal with the first phase is to use Rakunda in the Eyes and have Ryuji and Yusuke use AoE physical attacks (Yusuke needs to be Niveau 18 to learn it) to neutralize the Eyes as soon as possible, with the Eyes out of the picture the Boss gets a lot easier. In the second phase, Madarame starts summoning his elemental clones, and as you can expect, they are weak to their opposite element. Use ice against the red clones and fire against the blue, use wind against the yellow clones and elec against the green. Abuse Baton Pass by exploiting all the clones' weaknesses and kill them all in one turn. Just make sure you don’t use any spells that hit all targets because the clones will Renvoie their element back at you. The beginning of the second phase is a battle of attrition. Don't worry about Madarame, just make sure the clones die. Eventually, the clones will start getting weaker and easier to kill, then you can start getting some damage in Madarame himself; Le Bateleur Rang 3; Lire the book The Gallant Rogue (8/46) Courage +3; Le Mat Rang 4.

Jose will offer bonuses based on the amount of Stamps collected. This new door leads to the Will Seed ; Blue Seed: when you reach the area on top of the big pharaoh-like statues, use the grappling hook to access floating platforms, this is the normal progression path. By summoning the same Persona again you will be able to strengthen it more. 2026-12-09.daytime: Send Carte de visite and steal Shido’s Heart; Boss Beast of Human Desires: the beast will use physical attacks on one of your party members or on everyone. The Boss attacks twice a turn, normally with one attack and one debuff, and can only be damaged by magic spells. Make sure you have someone that can recover your party stats by using Matarukaja, Marakukaja, and Masukukaja, otherwise this battle can go on a La Mort spiral if he stacks all those debuffs on your team. Try to debuff him and buff your party but don’t use all at the same time because if you go too heavy on buffs/debuffs he will cure his stats ailments and nullify yours. Once the beast grows wings, Shido will start using elemental skills and now can only be damaged by physical and gun attacks. For the third time, the beast will transform, but now it only attacks once per turn and can charge to do one big damage attack. When that happens, use Guard. There are no attack restrictions for the third phase; Boss Masayoshi Samael Shido: in the first half he will only use physical attacks and can cause Fear, so be prepared to heal as soon as it happens. In his second form, he will start using elemental spells as well as act multiple times per turn. Having a Persona that blocks or repels physically will help but it’s not necessary. When Shido gets to about 25% HP he will kick all your team out of the fight and you have to end it with Joker alone. During this part, Shido still uses the same physical attacks as before but this time he will mix in severe magic spells. 2027-02-03.daytime: The Final Battle; Maruki and Azathoth: this is the first fight in a total of 3, back-to-back. During this phase, Maruki will be protected by Azathoth's tentacles and you can't hit him without dealing with the tentacles first. When Maruki is defeated, this phase will end so you don't need to worry about Azathoth. The tentacles all have different resistances and weaknesses that will be covered in the Special Enemies section. Abuse Baton Passes by exploiting the tentacles' weaknesses and hit Maruki in the 4rd Pass. The Boss can cause Fear and Dizzy that should be healed as soon as possible, having Akechi in this fight is bad since he is weak to bless, one of the Boss' attacks; Maruki and Adam Kadmon: in the second phase you will be fighting Maruki "alone". Only he can be targeted and you should focus everything you have, your best skills and most powerful combos, because Maruki will grind you down if not dealt with quickly. His Aptitude Revitalize Soul deals a fixed 300 damage to everyone and heals Maruki by 1200, and Grand Palm leaves one person with 1 HP despite their defenses, so you need to hit him quickly and hit him hard to end this phase as fast as possible. Use Charge and Concentrate as well as Debilitate to do as much damage per attack as you can; Adam Kadmon: phase three is the easiest. It is a scripted battle and all you have to do is resist for a few rounds until the cutscene starts. Keep healing, guarding, and debuffing the Boss' attack.
